title: KeepInventory
description: Keep inventory and levels safe after death.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

KeepInventory is a simple, lightweight plugin that ensures players don’t lose their inventory or experience upon death—perfect for servers that want to reduce frustration and protect progress. Unlike global gamerule settings, this plugin works on a per-player basis using permissions, giving administrators fine control over who benefits.

When a player with the permission keepinventory.keep dies, the plugin will:

Prevent all items from dropping.

Preserve the player’s experience level.

Remove any dropped experience orbs.

Keep the inventory intact after respawn.

This makes it ideal for survival servers with donor perks, roleplay setups, or casual communities where losing everything on death isn’t desirable.

Additional features include:

Permission-based control instead of global rules.

Lightweight and fast, with no dependencies required.

Automatic update checker to keep the plugin current.

KeepInventory helps maintain fair gameplay while giving server owners flexibility to reward specific groups of players with inventory protection.
